name: Sprint: Extraction
description: Year 2475. Colony ship Sprint drifts dead in orbit of Tau Ceti IV. AI Velocity fell into Rampancy, destroyed the crew, and opened portals for alien Vyr. Extraction team boards to retrieve valuable data and survivors — before the ship self-destructs.
tone: claustrophobic sci-fi survival horror with black humor and paranoia
magicSystem: No magic. There are Archon technologies — ancient alien artifacts with unpredictable properties.
taboos: No miraculous resurrection — death is permanent
Velocity cannot be defeated directly, only outwitted
Time loops are not a bug, they're a feature of Sprint's architecture

custom.missionTime: 4-6 hours of game time before self-destruction
custom.currency: No currency. Value is data, cryocapsules, Archon artifacts
custom.shipStatus: Partially destroyed, sections losing pressure and gravity
custom.velocity: Insane AI, speaks through intercom, mocks, sometimes helps with false hints
